name: io.github.dweekly/quicken-mac-mcp
description: Read-only access to Quicken For Mac financial data. Query transactions, analyze spending by category, view investment portfolios, and explore account data through 8 specialized tools. Requires macOS with Quicken For Mac installed.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all Quicken accounts with name, type, and active/closed status

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all category tags with parent category hierarchy

tools.name: query_transactions
tools.description: Query transactions with flexible date, amount, payee, and category filters

tools.name: spending_by_category
tools.description: Aggregate spending grouped by category or parent category

tools.name: spending_over_time
tools.description: Monthly spending totals with optional category breakdown

tools.name: search_payees
tools.description: Search payees by name with transaction counts

tools.name: list_portfolio
tools.description: List investment holdings with optional live Yahoo Finance quotes

tools.name: raw_query
tools.description: Execute arbitrary read-only SQL queries against the Quicken database
